subcodes.first_line: O thou who art captive in the path of God and bird of the spiritual nest! Though from the afflictions which have befallen and the successive tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای اسیر سبیل الهی و ای طیر آشیان معنوی اگر چه از مصائب وارده و بلیات متتابعه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @business; financial; property matters
